stemHtml: What is the correct definition of PCN (Pavement Classification Number)?

options.a: A number indicating the bearing strength of a pavement for unrestricted operations.
options.b: A number indicating the relative effect of an aircraft on a pavement for a specified standard subgrade category.
options.c: A value used to assess overall pavement condition.
options.d: A letter expressing the bearing strength of a pavement for restricted operations.
